name: ginkgolide A
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: platelet-activating factor receptor antagonism; ginkgolides also show glycine receptor channel blocking activity in preclinical models.
contraindications: No isolated-compound clinical interaction set established
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: platelet-activating factor receptor antagonism; ginkgolides also show glycine receptor channel blocking activity in preclinical models.
